s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT CABLE FROM NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL

atten2.ptxt: Wait for 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable to prevent the airbag from deploying (See page ).

s2.ptxt: Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide handle.
Using a screwdriver, disengage the 4 claws and remove the seat track cover.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INNER SEAT TRACK BRACKET COVER

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 4 claws and remove the inner seat track bracket cover.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Move the front seat assembly to the rearmost position by operating the slide handle.
Remove the 2 bolts on the front seat track bracket.
Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide handle.
Remove the 2 bolts on the rear seat track bracket.
Move the front seat assembly to the center position and adjust the seatback to the vertical position by operating the slide and reclining adjuster release handle.
